examples: All the children partook in the game.
The guests partook of a luxurious repast in the banqueting hall.
Betty and I both partook in what can be one of the most humanizing single elements of the Internet: Facebook birthday.
Last December, for instance, he went to one of the company's biggest Christmas parties, attended by 10, 000 people, many of whom partook in its "Philippine Idol" contest.
